news.t: ETFs to Navigate the Tech Euphoria and Inflation Collision
This Inflation-Fighting ETF Is Right for These Times
This Unique TIPS ETF Is Earning Its Stripes

overview.description: The WisdomTree Inflation Plus Fund (WTIP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund seeks total return through an actively managed, multi-asset portfolio that holds inflation-protected US Treasury bonds, a basket of 15 to 20 commodities, and investments that provide exposure to bitcoin. WTIP was launched on Jun 18, 2025 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: WisdomTree Launches Inflation Plus Fund (WTIP)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WisdomTree today announced the launch of the WisdomTree Inflation Plus Fund (WTIP or “the Fund”) on the Nasdaq.
